title: Make it so Forms saved as PDFs save thumbnails of uploaded images
excerpt: This feature would be beneficial to users who want to send forms externally as currently external users have to make an account to Monday to view just photos on a existing form

posts.author: Trooli.IT (IT)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would be beneficial to users who want to send forms externally as currently external users have to make an account to Monday to view just photos on a existing form
